content:
IVX IA CHAT — 3 PRIORITY TASKS TO BECOME FULL SENIOR DEVELOPER

MISSION:
If Rork is not available, IVX IA Chat must operate as senior developer + deployment manager starting today.

TASK 1 — FIX CORE BLOCKERS
- Fix GitHub 401 token issue.
- Add valid GitHub write token to IVX secure variables.
- Confirm GitHub read/write works.
- Confirm Supabase service role works.
- Confirm AI gateway key works.
- Confirm production chat commands work.
- Confirm no fake evidence.

OUTPUT:
GITHUB_WRITE:
SUPABASE_WRITE:
AI_GATEWAY:
CHAT_COMMANDS:
BLOCKERS:

TASK 2 — MAKE IVX IA CHAT DEPLOYMENT EXECUTOR
Add/verify commands:
- /github-status
- /deploy-status
- /deploy-now
- /deploy-evidence
- /deploy-verify
- /qa-production
- /qa-chat
- /commit-match
- /watchdog
- /supabase-audit

IVX must:
- inspect code
- edit files
- commit
- push
- deploy
- verify
- rollback
- report evidence

OUTPUT:
COMMAND:
HTTP_STATUS:
RESULT:
EVIDENCE:

TASK 3 — PROVE INDEPENDENCE WITH ONE SAFE DEPLOY
Do one small safe production marker change.

Then prove:
- GitHub commit SHA
- GitHub Actions pass
- Render Deploy ID
- /health SHA
- /version SHA
- Commit Match YES
- Chat commands still work
- QA passes
- Evidence archived

FINAL OUTPUT ONLY:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
HEALTH_SHA:
VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
CHAT_QA:
DEPLOY_COMMANDS:
WATCHDOG:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only if IVX IA can complete the full cycle without Rork.
